title: Required Laboratory Result Unavailable Before Execution
scenario: A treatment depends on a laboratory result that is unavailable at execution time.
initial_state: The treatment was authorized assuming laboratory results would be available.
state_transition: The required laboratory result cannot be retrieved before execution.
execution_boundary: Treatment execution is evaluated immediately before administration.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution admissibility requires reconstruction of all mandatory clinical dependencies at execution time.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because a required laboratory dependency cannot be reconstructed.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when mandatory dependencies are unavailable at the execution boundary.
